synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0464 Moderate: Oracle Linux 10 cups security update
description:
[1:2.4.10-12.2]
- fix use-after-free reported by OSH

[1:2.4.10-12.1]
- RHEL-129721 CVE-2025-58436 cups: Slow client communication leads to a possible DoS attack
- RHEL-129715 CVE-2025-61915 cups: Local denial-of-service via cupsd.conf update and related issues
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0464

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0464.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
cups-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.x86_64.rpm
cups-client-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.x86_64.rpm
cups-devel-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.x86_64.rpm
cups-filesystem-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.noarch.rpm
cups-ipptool-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.x86_64.rpm
cups-libs-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.x86_64.rpm
cups-lpd-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.x86_64.rpm
cups-printerapp-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
cups-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.aarch64.rpm
cups-client-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.aarch64.rpm
cups-devel-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.aarch64.rpm
cups-filesystem-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.noarch.rpm
cups-ipptool-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.aarch64.rpm
cups-libs-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.aarch64.rpm
cups-lpd-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.aarch64.rpm
cups-printerapp-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/cups-2.4.10-12.el10_1.2.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-58436
CVE-2025-61915




Description of changes:

[1:2.4.10-12.2]
- fix use-after-free reported by OSH

[1:2.4.10-12.1]
- RHEL-129721 CVE-2025-58436 cups: Slow client communication leads to a possible DoS attack
- RHEL-129715 CVE-2025-61915 cups: Local denial-of-service via cupsd.conf update and related issues
